_warning: 這是 App Store Connect 的 metadata 草稿。實際上架前需要逐項 review 並由你決定。

app_information.name: TimeMind — AI 任務管家
app_information.subtitle: 說一句話,自動拆成任務

description_zh.promotional_text: 用說的就能新增任務。TimeMind 把你的語音變成結構化的待辦清單,讓你專注在重要的事。
description_zh.subtitle: 說一句話,自動拆成任務
description: TimeMind 是專為忙碌的人打造的 AI 任務管家。
◆ 你只需要開口講
按住麥克風說「提醒我明天三點開會,準備投影片」,TimeMind 會自動拆解成任務、加上時間、歸進正確的分類。
◆ AI 幫你想下一步
不知道該從哪裡開始?TimeMind 會根據你的工作時段、優先度與剩餘精力,主動建議今天該做哪幾件事。
◆ 隱私優先
• 所有任務資料預設存在你的裝置,完全不上傳
• 訪客模式不需登入、不留個資
• 錄音只在你按下錄音鍵時啟用,處理完即刪
• 完整原始碼政策見設定頁
◆ 為 iPhone 量身打造
原生支援 iOS 18 以上的 Liquid Glass 風格、深色模式、動態字級、Spotlight 搜尋,以及 iPhone 主畫面 Widget。
◆ 功能一覽
• 語音輸入任務(支援繁體中文、簡體中文、英文、日文)
• AI 任務解析:自動標時間、分類、優先度、子任務
• 智慧排程建議:依工作時段、緩衝時間、優先度排序
• 多分類(工作/學習/生活/自訂)
• iCloud 風格帳戶隔離(本地版)
• Spotlight 整合
• 推播提醒(任務到期前 30 分鐘)
讓我們幫你把腦中的雜事,變成實際完成的事。
description_zh.keywords: 任務,待辦,todo,語音,AI,時間管理,排程
description_zh.whats_new: TimeMind 首發!感謝你成為早期使用者。

description_en.promotional_text: Speak your tasks. TimeMind turns voice into structured to-dos so you can focus on what matters.
description_en.subtitle: Speak. Auto-sorted.
description: TimeMind is the AI task assistant built for busy people.
◆ Just speak
Hold the mic and say "remind me at 3pm tomorrow to prep slides for the meeting" — TimeMind parses it into a task with time and category automatically.
◆ AI plans your day
Don't know where to start? TimeMind suggests today's tasks based on your working hours, priority, and remaining capacity.
◆ Privacy-first
• Tasks stored on your device by default, never uploaded
• Guest mode: no account needed, no personal data collected
• Microphone only activates when you tap record; audio is deleted after processing
◆ Built for iPhone
Native support for iOS 18+, Liquid Glass styling, dark mode, dynamic type, Spotlight integration, and home-screen widgets.
Let TimeMind turn your mental clutter into completed tasks.
description_en.whats_new: TimeMind launch! Thank you for being an early user.

app_privacy_labels._note: Apple 強制要填。每個類別決定是否蒐集,以及是否 link to user identity。
app_privacy_labels._guidance: 依 TimeMind 實際行為填寫。修改請與隱私政策文件一致。

items: Other User Content (task text, notes, categories)

app_privacy_labels.data_not_collected_disclaimer: TimeMind does not collect any data for advertising, marketing, or third-party tracking purposes. Voice recordings are processed locally and deleted after transcription; only the transcribed text is sent to AI services.

data_sharing.third_party_functionality: Voice audio and transcribed text are sent ONLY to DeepSeek and AssemblyAI services for task transcription / parsing (user-triggered, not automatic).

required_assets._note: 上架前必須有以下圖檔。截圖規格從真機產生。

app_icon_1024x1024.status: EXISTS — verify it is 1024x1024 with no transparency

ipad_12.9.note: optional — only if iPad is supported

app_review._note: 送審時填寫的 Apple 審查員會看到的資訊

signin_credentials._note: Apple 規定:若 App 需登入才能進入主介面,審查員必須能用一組測試帳號登入。
signin_credentials._action_required: Before submission: create demo@timemind.app in your auth system and store the password as EAS Secret APP_REVIEW_DEMO_PASSWORD.
signin_credentials._important: Make sure this demo account has EXAMPLE TASKS already populated so the reviewer sees real functionality.

review_notes_zh: 感謝審查。本 App 提供一組 demo 帳號(email 見 Sign-in Information)供你直接登入查看主介面與所有功能。
1. 登入後會看到已預先建立的範例任務(涵蓋語音輸入、AI 解析、多分類)。
2. 若想測語音錄音功能,請到 Settings → Voice Input 啟用麥克風權限。
3. AI 功能需要網路;DeepSeek / AssemblyAI 為付費 API,在審查期間可能用量受限,請放心測試,我們已預先載入範例資料。
如有問題,請透過 review@timemind.app 與我們聯絡。

prelaunch_checklist._note: 送審前必須勾選的項目
items.app_works_on_first_launch_no_account_req: PARTIAL — guest mode works, but review account provided
